features.name: memory with reader and readwriter ports
features.description: Code should include a memory declaration with both a reader port and a readwriter port, with read-latency and write-latency both set to 1
features.snippet:
mem memory:
  data-type => UInt<32>
  depth => 8
  reader => r
  readwriter => rw
  read-latency => 1
  write-latency => 1

features.name: readwriter port address registered with enable gating
features.description: Code should include a read-write port where the address is registered only when the enable signal is high, using conditional assignment inside an always block

features.name: inconsistent enable handling between read and readwrite ports
features.description: Code should include both a read port and a read-write port where enable gating is handled differently between them (one conditionally registers address, other unconditionally)
